claim_support.reason: Material claim regarding stock performance ('gained 15.6% over the past month') is repeated in two sections (Recent Developments Para 1, Business & Competitive Analysis Para 3) but is not supported by any of the cited evidence chunks or calculation objects. The provided news snippets discuss analyst initiation and all-time highs but do not contain the specific percentage figure.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe mathematical error in Revenue YoY Growth calculation. Financial Analysis Para 1 states Q3 2025 revenue of $15,952M and Q3 2024 revenue of $13,072M, which implies ~22% growth. However, the report and the provided calculation object [01aa0843...] state 6.32% growth. The calculation object is internally inconsistent with the visible source data it displays.

citation_precision.reason: Citations for the 15.6% stock gain claim (Recent Developments Para 1 and Business & Competitive Analysis Para 3) point to news chunks that do not contain this specific data point, failing to validate the claim. Most financial citations are precise, but this material market data claim lacks evidentiary support in the linked chunks.

temporal_validity.reason: All financial periods (Q3 2025 ended 2025-08-03) and news dates (2025-09-15) are prior to or on the report as-of date (2025-09-15). No post-as-of claims or future-dated facts were identified.

consistency.reason: Direct contradiction on employee count within Company Overview: Para 1 states 37,000 employees (supported by chunk [02a644b8...]), while Para 2 states 19,000 employees (supported by chunk [6e7211e9...]). Additionally, the Revenue Growth rate (6.32%) is inconsistent with the Revenue figures ($15,952M vs $13,072M) presented in the same paragraph.
